entity.label: Hanan

entity.description: One of the Levites who assisted Ezra (Neh. 8:7).

nodes.label: Hanan
nodes.description: One of the Levites who assisted Ezra (Neh. 8:7).

verses.text: Also Jeshua, and Bani, and Sherebiah, Jamin, Akkub, Shabbethai, Hodijah, Maaseiah, Kelita, Azariah, Jozabad, Hanan, Pelaiah, and the Levites, caused the people to understand the law: and the people stood in their place.
And their brethren, Shebaniah, Hodijah, Kelita, Pelaiah, Hanan,
